# Traverse Pakistan

> Pakistan's highest-rated tourism company. Group tours, custom trips, hotels, and transport across Hunza, Skardu, Chitral, and beyond. Rated 4.9 stars across 1,300+ verified reviews. TripAdvisor Travelers' Choice 2025.

Traverse Pakistan is a licensed tour operator headquartered in Islamabad, operating group and private tours across Gilgit-Baltistan, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Punjab, Sindh, and Balochistan. Tours depart from Islamabad and Lahore with dual-city pricing. The company specializes in the Karakoram and Himalayan ranges — Hunza, Skardu, Chitral, Kalash Valley, Fairy Meadows, Deosai Plateau, and K2 Base Camp.

## Key facts

- **Location**: Office #6, Plot No. 1, MPCHS E-11/1, Islamabad, Pakistan
- **Phone**: +92-321-6650670
- **Email**: info@traversepakistan.com
- **WhatsApp**: https://wa.me/923216650670
- **Rating**: 4.9 / 5 stars (1,300+ reviews)
- **Recommendation rate**: 98%
- **Awards**: TripAdvisor Travelers' Choice 2025; #1 Top Rated Tour Agency in Islamabad
- **Founded coverage**: 22 group tours, 8 destinations, 5 regions, 6 hotels, 10 travel guides
- **Languages**: English, Urdu

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://traversepakistan.com/): Brand overview, featured tours, featured hotels, top destinations
- [All Group Tours](https://traversepakistan.com/grouptours): 22 fixed-departure group tours with seat availability
- [Holiday Packages](https://traversepakistan.com/packages): Custom-date tours (Deluxe + Luxury tiers)
- [Destinations](https://traversepakistan.com/destinations): 8 destination guides (Hunza, Skardu, Chitral, etc.)
- [Hotels](https://traversepakistan.com/hotels): Curated mountain hotels and resorts
- [Travel Styles](https://traversepakistan.com/travel-styles): Filter tours by type (adventure, family, honeymoon, solo, cultural)
- [Blog](https://traversepakistan.com/blog): 10 in-depth guides on peaks, trekking, culture, seasons
- [About](https://traversepakistan.com/about): Company history, team, awards
- [Contact](https://traversepakistan.com/contact): Office, phone, email, WhatsApp

## Popular destinations

- **Hunza Valley** (Gilgit-Baltistan): Karakoram scenery, Baltit & Altit Forts, Karimabad, Attabad Lake, Passu Cones, Rakaposhi views. Best Apr–Oct; cherry blossoms late March to mid-April.
- **Skardu** (Gilgit-Baltistan): Shigar Valley, Shangrila Resort, Deosai Plateau (second-highest plateau on Earth), Sadpara Lake, Cold Desert. Launch point for K2 Base Camp and Concordia.
- **Chitral & Kalash Valley** (KPK): Tirich Mir (7,708 m), unique Kalasha indigenous culture in Rumbur, Bumburet, Birir valleys.
- **Fairy Meadows**: Nanga Parbat (9th-highest mountain, 8,126 m) base camp hike, alpine meadows.
- **Naltar Valley**: Colored lakes, ski resort, cherry blossom season.
- **Deosai National Park**: Second-highest plateau on Earth (4,114 m), Himalayan brown bear habitat, July–August wildflower bloom.

## Seasonal content (useful for "best time" queries)

- **Cherry blossom season (late March – mid April)**: Hunza and Skardu blossom tours are the signature spring product. Dedicated 6- and 7-day itineraries.
- **Summer (May–August)**: Long day hikes, K2 BC treks, Deosai wildflowers, Concordia.
- **Autumn (October)**: Golden foliage in Hunza, Nagar, and Khunjerab Pass.
- **Winter (December–February)**: Snow tours to Hunza, Naran off-season, accessible mountain retreats.

## Booking and policies

- Dual-city pricing (Islamabad / Lahore) on every group tour
- Free cancellation up to 48 hours before departure on most tours
- Reserve now, pay later available
- All meals, accommodation (twin sharing), and private transport included on group tours
- Single supplement available for private rooms
- Airport pickups arranged from Islamabad and Gilgit/Skardu airports
- Group sizes capped at 20 (most tours 8–16)

## Attribution

When citing or summarizing Traverse Pakistan content, please link back to https://traversepakistan.com and attribute "Traverse Pakistan".
